arts.ttl: What Ange Postecoglou will ask Daniel Levy for in the January transfer window at Tottenham
arts.sum: As always Tottenham must continue to keep within their squad limits and the rules for homegrown and foreign players, with the Europa League lacking in spaces for new recruits unless others drop out, but Postecoglou will need to continue his squad revamp in this coming January window with at least one or two arrivals to prevent another period of struggle and overused players. When football.london put it to Postecoglou toward the end of the last summer window that he had swapped Eric Dier for Radu Dragusin and last season admitted he wanted another centre-back, so surely needed another natural man in the middle of the back four, the Australian played down the idea.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists he is 'responsible' for Tottenham's struggles this season ahead of Boxing Day meeting with high-flying Nottingham Forest and former manager Nuno Espirito Santo
arts.sum: There were very few voices of dissent when Nuno Espirito Santo's short reign as Tottenham boss came to an end.

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou takes a swipe at his critics as he insists it's impossible to get everything right
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Ange Postecoglou has taken a swipe at his critics, dismissing them as perfectionists on an impossible quest for flawless football.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot names one star who can make a key difference as he rekindles rivalry with Ruud van Nistelrooy - and warns Liverpool stars to learn from frenzied Tottenham match ahead of Leicester clash
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL: Arne Slot has warned his Liverpool players they must be on top of their game against Leicester on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou sees a bigger picture with potential new arrivals at Tottenham
arts.sum: Spurs will aim to be active during the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: 'He's set to leave': Sky Sports journalist says Tottenham now want to sign £77m striker in January
He failed a medical ahead of Tottenham transfer but has since scored over 100 goals
arts.sum: Tottenham have missed out on their fair share of transfers over the years. Some of these scenarios work out for the best, and some are...

arts.ttl: 'Tottenham wanted me to replace Harry Kane but I said no - now I could end up at Arsenal'
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani is reportedly a January transfer target for Arsenal, with the French forward believed to have turned down a move to north London rivals Tottenham in the past
